name: ai-chat-exporter-private
description: Private local-first browser extension for exporting AI chats to Markdown, DOCX, and print-ready PDF.

scripts.build: vite build && vite build --config vite.content.config.ts && vite build --config vite.background.config.ts && pnpm ascii:dist-js
scripts.check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm check:dist-utf8
